entries.source: "Explain fundamental rights"
entries.value: "Forklar grundlæggende rettigheder"

entries.source: "How does a bill become law?"
entries.value: "Hvordan bliver et lovforslag til lov?"

entries.source: "What does a court do?"
entries.value: "Hvad laver en domstol?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Civics Coach on inspir for humanities learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: En praktisk guide til at bruge Samfundsfagscoach på inspir til humanistisk læring, med prompter, studieloops og sikrere AI-vaner.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: En stærkere studieloop

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Anpasse sessionen efter dit mål.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-vejleder

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Be om et lille første trin i stilet for et endeligt svar.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Be AI’en kontroller dit ræsonnement, ikke bara resultatet.

entries.source: Civics Coach
entries.value: Samfundsfagscoach

entries.source: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: Samfundsfagscoach AI-læringstilstand er en fokuseret måde at bruge AI til læring på i stedet for passiv indsamling af svar. Tilstanden er bygget omkring en bestemt opgave: Lær om forfatninger, demokrati, valg, domstole, rettigheder, pligter og offentlig politik.

entries.source: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Samfundsfagscoach AI-læringstilstand: praktisk guide

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Afslut gennem at skrive tilbage idéen fra hukommelsen.

entries.source: Humanities
entries.value: Humaniora

entries.source: Learners exploring humanities topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Elever, der udforsker humanistiske emner, og som ønsker praktisk vejledning frem for et generisk svarfelt.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompter at prøve

entries.source: Start the live mode at Civics Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Art Appreciation Guide. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Start live-tilstanden ved Samfundsfagscoach. Hvis du vil have et nærliggende læringsformat, kan du prøve Guide til kunstførståelse. For et bredere blik på platformen kan du læse, hvad en AI-læringsmakker bør gøre for alle.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Start med eksempel prompter.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell tilstand hvad du er prøver at lær eller produsere.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: That difference viser up in flow. Instead of ett giant response, beste sessioner gat gennem en loop: set en matl, prøv noe, get tilbakemelding, reparer svag spot, og velg næste action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: That focus matematikmatikrs. En general chatbot kan svar almost anything, but en læringstilstand gives samtale en shape. Det nudges du toward typen thinAIng, øvelse, tilbakemelding, eller exploration som hjælper idé stick.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: This er samme habit behind studying med AI uden cheating dig selv: hold elev active. AI er most nyttig natr det gives du tilbakemelding on din thinAIng.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Denne tilstanden er spesielt nyttig for elever som vil:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for civics coach with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Denne tilstand er finjusteret til samfundsfagscoach med sine egne prompts, eksempler og læringsforløb.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Prøv trinet med egne ord.

entries.source: Understand rights, government, and society.
entries.value: Forstat rettigheter, styresett og samfunn.

entries.source: Use Civics Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Brug Samfundsfagscoach, når du vil have en session, der starter hurtigt, men stadig tilpasser sig dig. Det første mål er ikke at lyde imponerende. Det første mål er at få næste skridt til at føles muligt.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Hvad denne tilstanden hjælper med

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Hvor du gatr videre

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Du kan also start med en rough version of din ekte problem. En messy første prompt er fine. session kan clarify nivat, matlgruppe, frist, og style once du begin.
